digest.component_or_area: rebar documentation remediation epic (docs + CI drift gates)
propositions: README's session-log command syntax is invalid, missing the append subcommand, and the quickstart is not a runnable end-to-end path.
README and docs/config.md state the wrong dependency count and mcp version floor (truth: 3 base deps, mcp>=1.9).
docs/output-schemas.md points at a moved source path and describes a removed bash shell-out; stale bash-engine language remains in CI comments and leaf.py.
docs/README.md index is incomplete (4 unlinked living docs) and conflates living reference with historical evidence.
A CI gate must extract and execute the literal fenced commands from the README quickstart so wrong printed command text fails the build.
A docs-index CI gate must fail the build when living docs are unlinked or relative links to relocated docs do not resolve.
